events.label: assistant
events.text: Assessment written to `/app/answer.json`. Since the sheet excerpt is cropped so the title block, revision, and matching weld callout aren't visible, the field weld can't be traced to its controlling drawing revision — that's a documentation/traceability gap, not a confirmed physical defect. I called it `needs_more_info` (not pass, since compliance can't be verified; not fail, since no actual nonconformance was observed), with `medium` risk and corrective actions focused on re-establishing traceability (full drawing sheet, WPS/welder quals per AWS D1.1, re-photographing with a legible title block) before final sign-off.
